name: Ghostly Prism
description: Notes A more peculiar prism. Unlike other prisms each use leaves behind a stationary grenade which does not attract enemies, and then detonates in a series of six explosions, similar to a Rock Candy. Each explosion is centered within a tile of the grenade, but the exact epicenter of each explosion is random.
effects: Teleport to cursor Spawns a stationary non-decoy grenade that explodes at the end of its duration Number of explosions: 6
